claims.evidence_text: In grain crops (wheat, barley, oats), uniformly dried crops do not have to be windrowed ... but can easily be straight-cut and harvested ... it enhances grain storage when the grain has a lower and more uniform moisture content.
claims.claim_summary: Pre-harvest glyphosate desiccation of wheat produces a lower, more uniform grain moisture content, enabling straight-cut harvest and improved grain storage.

claims.evidence_text: crop desiccants are so named because application just before harvest kills the crop plants so that the food crop dries from normal environmental conditions ("dry-down") more quickly and evenly.
claims.claim_summary: Pre-harvest desiccant application to grain crops including wheat accelerates and evens out crop dry-down before harvest.
